name: PolyPeptide Group
description: Global CDMO specializing in peptide API manufacturing with cGMP facilities in the US, Europe, and India. Capabilities from early development through commercial-scale production.

name: Bachem
description: Leading independent CDMO for peptide and oligonucleotide APIs. Over 50 years of experience in complex peptide manufacturing from research through commercial scale.

name: Genscript ProBio
description: CDMO offering end-to-end peptide drug development services including solid-phase synthesis, purification, lyophilization, and fill-finish under cGMP.

name: Pepscan
description: Netherlands-based CDMO with US operations specializing in constrained peptide drug discovery and cGMP manufacturing for clinical and commercial supply.

name: AmbioPharm
description: US-based peptide CDMO offering large-scale solid-phase and solution-phase peptide synthesis with cGMP manufacturing and regulatory filing support.

name: Corden Pharma
description: Full-service CDMO with peptide API synthesis, lipid chemistry, and drug product manufacturing capabilities across multiple US and European facilities.

name: Vivitide (formerly New England Peptide)
description: Peptide CDMO specializing in custom peptide synthesis from milligram to multi-kilogram scale, including modified and cyclic peptides under cGMP.

name: CS Bio
description: Peptide synthesis equipment manufacturer and CDMO providing custom peptide production, peptide synthesizers, and GMP manufacturing services.
